# plot_compared_large_scale_characteristics { #cdmconnector.plot_compared_large_scale_characteristics }

```python
plot_compared_large_scale_characteristics(
    result,
    *,
    colour=None,
    reference=None,
    facet=None,
)
```

Compare large-scale characteristics across groups as a scatter plot.

Plots frequency in reference group (x-axis) vs frequency in comparator
group (y-axis) for each concept.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type                                                         | Description   | Default    |
|-----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result    | SummarisedResult from summarise_large_scale_characteristics. |               | _required_ |
| colour    | Column to colour by.                                         |               | `None`     |
| reference | Reference group level for comparison.                        |               | `None`     |
| facet     | Column(s) to facet by.                                       |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                     | Description   |
|--------|--------------------------|---------------|
|        | matplotlib.figure.Figure |               |
